threat_description: Attacker spoofs a legitimate user’s identity to bypass access controls.
mitigation: Enforce strong authentication (MFA, unique credentials) and monitor for anomalous login behavior.

threat_description: Attacker disputes or denies actions taken (e.g. malicious changes) to evade accountability.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Implement robust logging with cryptographic non-repudiation (digitally signed logs) and time stamps.

threat_description: Unauthorized actor invokes API endpoints under a spoofed session token.
mitigation: Validate and bind session tokens to user context; rotate and expire tokens frequently.

threat_description: Attacker tampers with HTTP request parameters to elevate privileges or change data.
mitigation: Validate and sanitize all input; implement parameterized requests and payload integrity checks.

threat_description: Lack of reliable audit trail allows user to deny having performed an action.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Ensure detailed, immutable audit logs with unique user identifiers and time stamps.

threat_description: Error messages leak stack traces or config details, exposing sensitive info.
mitigation: Return generic error pages; disable debug information in production.

threat_description: High volume of HTTP requests overwhelms the function, causing downtime.
mitigation: Implement rate limiting, WAF, and autoscaling with throttling policies.

threat_description: Misconfigured Azure RBAC allows attacker to elevate privileges via function settings.
mitigation: Apply least-privilege principles; restrict function app managed identity permissions.

threat_description: An attacker forges user claims to bypass role checks.
mitigation: Cryptographically validate JWT claims; enforce server-side role checks.

threat_description: Logic tampering via code injection alters permission evaluation.
mitigation: Use secure coding practices; perform code-review and fine-grained input validation.

threat_description: Insufficient logging of authorization decisions allows repudiation of grant/deny actions.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Log all authorization attempts with user ID, timestamp, and outcome.

threat_description: Debug endpoints expose user roles or policy logic.
mitigation: Remove or secure any debug/diagnostic endpoints; enforce auth on admin APIs.

threat_description: Heavy role‐check loops can be abused to slow service or cause crashes.
mitigation: Limit recursion; cache role mappings; apply execution timeouts.

threat_description: Privilege escalation through misconfigured policy giving admin rights.
mitre_atlas: T1548.003: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Windows Management Instrumentation
mitigation: Review policy definitions; enforce separation of duty and RBAC least privilege.

threat_description: Malicious interception and modification of HTTP requests in transit.
mitigation: Enforce TLS 1.2+ with HSTS and certificate pinning where possible.

threat_description: Eavesdropping on unencrypted HTTP traffic exposes session tokens.
mitigation: Use HTTPS exclusively; disable HTTP; enable Perfect Forward Secrecy.

threat_description: Flooding the front-end with requests to exhaust resources.
mitigation: Implement WAF rules, rate limiting, and CAPTCHA on forms.

threat_description: Attacker uses stolen API key to masquerade as a valid client.
mitigation: Rotate and scope API keys; enforce mTLS or signed requests.

threat_description: Adversary tampers with JSON payload to alter data operations.
mitigation: Validate and sanitize payloads; use parameterized calls.

threat_description: Lack of request/response logging enables denial of API calls performed.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Implement immutable, timestamped API logs with request IDs.

threat_description: Detailed error stack traces reveal internal code structure.
mitigation: Disable detailed errors; return generic messages.

threat_description: Flooding API endpoints exhausts function concurrency and downstream resources.
mitigation: Apply rate limits, circuit breakers, and WAF protection.

threat_description: Misconfigured role assignment allows API to perform unauthorized actions.
mitigation: Enforce least-privilege on managed identity; regular RBAC reviews.

threat_description: Impersonation of the container instance to push malicious builds.
mitre_atlas: T1587.002: Hijack Execution Flow: DLL Side-Loading
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08:2021: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Authenticate container instance via certificates; validate build source.

threat_description: Tampering of deployment scripts or build artifacts before deployment.
mitigation: Sign and verify artifacts; enforce pipeline code reviews.

threat_description: Container actions not logged allow repudiation of changes to prod infra.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable container activity logs with integrity checks.

threat_description: Sensitive environment variables (keys) leak via container logs.
mitigation: Redact secrets from logs; use managed identities.

threat_description: Overconsumption of CPU/memory by build processes causes pipeline failure.
mitigation: Resource quotas, autoscaling, and health probes.

threat_description: Compromised instance elevates to Contributor across the Dev Resource Group.
mitigation: Assign minimal roles; use separate service principals for pipeline.

threat_description: Adversary spoofs the automation account identity to run arbitrary scripts.
mitigation: Use strong authentication (managed identity); rotate keys.

threat_description: Runbook code is tampered with to deploy malicious resources.
mitigation: Store runbooks in secure repo; enforce code signing.

threat_description: Lack of runbook execution logs allows repudiation of changes made.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable audit logs for all runbook actions in Log Analytics.

threat_description: Runbook outputs include plain‐text secrets from Key Vault.
mitigation: Mask secrets in logs; limit verbose output.

threat_description: Mass triggering of runbooks exhausts automation throughput.
mitigation: Throttle runbook triggers; implement approval workflows.

threat_description: Compromised account elevates privileges to Owner on production RG.
mitigation: Use separate least-privileged service principal for prod; monitor RBAC changes.

threat_description: Malicious actor modifies static assets or config blobs.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08:2021: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Enable blob immutability policies and SAS tokens with write restrictions.

threat_description: Uploader denies having changed configuration blobs.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable Storage Analytics logs with read/write auditing.

threat_description: Public access to container leaks environment configuration.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Disable public access; enforce private endpoints.

threat_description: Excessive read/write requests throttle access for legitimate users.
mitigation: Apply storage account throttling, SAS token limits, and monitoring.

threat_description: Injection of malicious build artifacts into Dev container.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08:2021: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Restrict write access; scan blobs for malware.

threat_description: No audit trail of who uploaded or modified artifacts.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable blob-level auditing and alert on changes.

threat_description: Access to build artifacts discloses proprietary code.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Use private endpoints and RBAC; encrypt at rest.

threat_description: Bulk uploads of large blobs exhaust storage capacity.
mitigation: Quota on container size; monitor metrics.

threat_description: Attacker modifies resource configurations (VM, Functions).
mitigation: Lock critical resources; enable RBAC with MFA.

threat_description: Changes to resources go unlogged, enabling repudiation.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable Azure Activity Logs with retention and alerts.

threat_description: Metadata about deployed services disclosed via API endpoints.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Restrict resource discovery APIs; use private links.

threat_description: Mass deletion or stop commands render production unavailable.
mitigation: Apply resource locks and multi-user approvals.

threat_description: Unauthorized modification of code packages before execution.
mitigation: Code signing and validation at runtime.

threat_description: Changes to code not tracked or logged, enabling repudiation.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Use version control with immutable history and alert on changes.

threat_description: Exposure of code in transit reveals business logic and secrets.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Encrypt transport channels; restrict access to package store.

threat_description: Large code downloads slow or block function startup.
mitigation: Optimize package size; use caching; deploy incremental updates.

threat_description: Alteration of secrets in Key Vault to gain unauthorized access.
mitigation: Enable Key Vault purge protection and RBAC logging.

threat_description: No audit of key accesses allows denial of secret retrieval.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable Key Vault logging and alert on access anomalies.

threat_description: Misconfigured vault policies expose secrets to unintended consumers.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Scope vault access via firewall and private endpoints.

threat_description: High request volume leads to throttling and credential retrieval failures.
mitigation: Implement caching and retry strategies with backoff.

threat_description: Unauthorized modification of blog media blobs.
mitigation: Enable blob immutability and soft delete.

threat_description: No granular logs of blob changes, enabling repudiation.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable storage analytics and Change Feed auditing.

threat_description: Public container settings disclose user-uploaded media.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Disable anonymous access; use SAS tokens.

threat_description: Large malicious uploads exhaust storage quotas.
mitigation: Enforce upload size limits and monitor metrics.

threat_description: Injection of malicious documents or update operations.
mitigation: Validate inputs; use parameterized queries and stored procedures.

threat_description: Writes to DB go unlogged, allowing denial of malicious inserts.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09:2021: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable diagnostic logging and retention.

threat_description: Misconfigured firewall allows unauthorized read operations.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Restrict IP ranges and use VNET integration.

threat_description: High volume of queries exhausts provisioned RU/s and throttles service.
mitigation: Monitor RU usage; implement backoff and caching.

element: Blog Application → Application Resource Storage Container
threat_description: Intercepting and modifying config/blob requests.
mitigation: Use HTTPS with mutual auth; SAS tokens signed and scoped.

element: Blog Application → Application Resource Storage Container
threat_description: Eavesdropping reveals static asset contents and configs.
mitigation: Encrypt in transit; enforce TLS 1.2+.

element: Blog Application → Application Resource Storage Container
threat_description: Excessive read/write floods the storage container.
mitigation: Enforce request rate limits and quotas.

element: Application Resource Storage Container → Dev Storage Container
threat_description: Tampering with copy pipeline to divert artifacts.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08:2021: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Authenticate pipeline steps; verify source/destination signatures.

element: Application Resource Storage Container → Dev Storage Container
threat_description: Leak of proprietary artifacts during copy operations.
mitigation: Encrypt replication channels; use private endpoints.

element: Application Resource Storage Container → Dev Storage Container
threat_description: High-throughput copying overwhelms source container.
mitigation: Throttle copy jobs; schedule off-peak replication.

threat_description: Supplying malicious build to the instance via the blob trigger.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08:2021: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Validate artifact checksums; scan for malware.

threat_description: Exposure of build artifact contents in clear during transfer.
mitigation: Use HTTPS or private link; encrypt blobs in transit.

threat_description: Frequent/bulky triggers degrade CI/CD availability.
mitigation: Implement debounce on triggers; limit blob event volume.

threat_description: Forged automation calls to execute unauthorized runbooks.
mitigation: Mutual authentication between instance and automation account.

threat_description: Sensitive context or parameters disclosed in API call payloads.
mitigation: Encrypt payload; minimize sensitive data passed.

threat_description: Flooding automation API calls exhausts runbook capacity.
mitigation: Throttle API calls; implement backoff.

threat_description: Runbook creates malicious or unexpected resources in the RG.
mitigation: Validate runbook actions; use resource locks.

threat_description: Resource metadata leaked via deployment scripts outputs.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Suppress verbose outputs; protect logs.

threat_description: Automation floods resource creation/deletion, degrading service.
mitigation: Rate-limit resource modifications; require approvals.

threat_description: Compromised RG metadata or keys exposed to attacker.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Isolate production RG; monitor for lateral access.

threat_description: Attacker tampers with resource definitions to gain persistent access.
mitigation: Apply locks; alert on config changes.

threat_description: Deletion or stoppage of services by attacker causes outage.
mitigation: Enable multi-factor for high-impact operations; resource locks.

threat_description: Attackers alter internal call to skip authorization checks.
mitigation: Implement in-process calls; authenticate internal endpoints.

threat_description: User role data sent in clear exposes privilege levels.
mitigation: Encrypt internal channels; sign role tokens.

threat_description: High rate of auth calls drains function resources.
mitigation: Cache auth results; apply rate limiting.

threat_description: Tampering with decision result bypasses access controls.
mitigation: Cryptographically sign outcome; validate in caller.

threat_description: Exposed decision path reveals policy rules to attacker.
mitigation: Mask internal logic; return generic allow/deny codes.

threat_description: Flood of allow/deny events overwhelms downstream logging.
mitigation: Throttling on auth result logging; backpressure.

threat_description: Swapping code package to inject malicious logic.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08:2021: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Validate package signatures; use CI/CD notarization.

threat_description: Source code leakage reveals business logic and secrets.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Restrict code repo access; encrypt transport.

threat_description: Large code downloads cause API startup failures.
mitigation: Cache code locally; optimize payload size.

threat_description: Intercepting Key Vault responses to obtain secrets.
mitigation: Enforce managed identity with TLS; certificate pinning.

threat_description: Leaked secrets in transit allow lateral movement.
mitigation: Use secure channel (HTTPS) and limit exposure in logs.

threat_description: Excessive vault requests lock out legitimate API calls.
mitigation: Cache credentials; implement retry/backoff.

threat_description: Intercepting blob write to inject malicious content.
mitigation: Use SAS tokens with write restrictions over HTTPS.

threat_description: Unauthorized listing of blobs reveals user data.
mitigation: Enforce scoped SAS tokens; private endpoints.

threat_description: High-frequency storage operations degrade performance.
mitigation: Throttle blob operations; add retry/backoff.

threat_description: NoSQL injection in query parameters modifies data.
mitigation: Escape inputs; use parameterized queries or stored procedures.

threat_description: Unrestricted export of DB content exposes all posts/comments.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Enforce query limits; require authorization for export.

threat_description: Excessive query load exhausts provisioned throughput.
mitigation: Implement caching, RU quotas, and request throttling.
